heading: Looking to understand Ethereum?
description: This whitepaper was published in 2014, before Ethereum launched. After 10+ years of development, major upgrades, and ecosystem growth, the original whitepaper no longer reflects what Ethereum is today.
evolution-pos: Ethereum moved from proof-of-work to proof-of-stake (The Merge, 2022)
evolution-l2: Layer 2 scaling solutions now process millions of transactions
evolution-usecases: DeFi, NFTs, and DAOs emerged as major use cases
evolution-standards: Smart contract standards (ERC-20, ERC-721) became industry foundations
